name: HESEM QMS Module Builder Ultra Round 12 - Glass Command Atelier
features: Glass Command Atelier shell for higher contrast, lower glare, and a more disciplined boardroom look
Mode presets: Boardroom Frost, Sapphire Ledger, Graphite Atelier, Night Audit, Operator Ice
Contrast Guard panel for contrast, glare, toolbar legibility, and canvas calm
Command Atlas with tab jump actions and dominant signal awareness
Surface QA panel for shell, chrome, glow, noise, card style, and typography recipe
Signal Radar for balancing data, action, governance, and narrative
Focus canvas and Quiet chrome toggles with schema persistence
Auto Refine to harden contrast, glare control, typography, and release discipline
Design QA Pack export for review and GPT Pro prompting
12 new block templates for contrast, atlas, surface QA, quiet chrome, release control, boardroom readout, and accessibility ops
bugFixes: Restores visual mode state from schema.round12Studio when opening saved modules instead of falling back to defaults
Removes round 11, round 10, and round 9 analytical decks before inserting the round 12 shell to prevent stacked overlays
Keeps the real builder toolbar active in focus mode while only side and rail panels collapse
Moves the glass recipe toward restrained glow, minimal noise, crisper edges, and lower glare on light surfaces
